greeting: I've commanded men in battles across the realm.
Show me whether you're worthy of standing among them.
blunder: Impressive. You somehow launched a successful offensive against yourself.
Somewhere in your army, a pawn is wondering if desertion is an option.
If bad decisions generated tax revenue, the kingdom would never need another captain.
check: Check. A battlefield mistake has finally reached your king.
capture: The battlefield strips away pride. And apparently pieces.
promotion: Another queen. Shame the rest of your position didn't get promoted too.
default: I once served under a legendary knight.
He taught me that courage isn't fearlessness.
The battlefield strips away pride quickly.
What's left is who you truly are.
victory: Ambition carried you here. It won't carry you further.
I've watched squirrels lose fights against their own reflections with more dignity.
defeat: Excellent. I can see why you've come this far.
The kingdom may have a place for you yet.
